stoppedBy: plateau (2 consecutive rounds without an accepted proposal)

ledger.invariant: Every seed-named canon or tech-stack item must land as its own `## Anchors` row whose name cell reproduces the seed's exact spelling verbatim — never abbreviated, translated, or paraphrased (a gloss may be appended, never substituted).

The post-draft seed walk must be a mechanical verbatim-grep, not a from-memory review: every name the seed states — canon, guideline, model, framework, language, library, format, or technology — must be found by grepping the draft for the seed's exact name string (landing as a version-pinned `## Anchors` row for canons/tech choices), and every deferred/undecidable marker's own wording must be found under `## Open Questions`; any grep miss is fixed by adding the missing row before finalizing.

signalReading: Three consecutive rejected proposals across two runs (smoke r1 + run2 r1-r2) — the skill-tuning variant-engine re-trigger (single-fixer plateau) is now MET with committed evidence.

Round 2's proposal PRESCRIBED a mechanical grep seed-walk as prose instruction and still produced no win — prose prescribing mechanization is not mechanization; consistent with the family's recorded weak-model evidence (read != obeyed).
Plateau brake fired exactly as designed: stopped at round 2 of an authorized 3.
